chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Rev. App. No. S – 101 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of MA No.226/2025 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 06.10.2025 Mr. Ubedullah Ghoto, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Alam Sher Khan Bozdar, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsels for the parties as well as learned Additional PG, after arguing the matter for some length, conceded that as the mandatory provision of notice under Section 439, Cr.P.C. was not available to the applicant when the impugned judgment was passed, whereby no show cause on account of enhancement made therein being available, the matter be remanded by setting aside the impugned judgment dated 09.12.2024 of the learned Additional Sessions Judge, Daharki, passed in Criminal Appeal No.18 of 2024 (Re: Lal Chand Menghwar v. The State). Learned Counsel for the applicant contended that bail may be granted. However, as tabulation has not been made by this Court and only enhancement has been challenged, let the required powers be exercised by the learned trial Court in case bail is available and main period has not been expired, as the question of enhancement has been set aside. In the above terms, this Criminal Revision Application stands disposed of. J U D G E Abdul Basit
